std-cli quality gate
source_file_limit=500
config_file_limit=300
command=cargo fmt --all --check
command=cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
command=DYLINT_RUSTFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo dylint --workspace --all -- --all-targets
command=cargo +nightly-2025-09-18 test --manifest-path crates/file_too_long/Cargo.toml
command=cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads=1
command=cargo deny check
command=cargo machete
smoke=std doctor
smoke=std-launcher --smoke "rebuild index"
smoke=std-launcher --hotkey-smoke Alt+Space
smoke=std-launcher --window-smoke
smoke=std-studio --smoke
smoke=std workflow trace --limit 5
smoke=std index coverage
smoke=std plugin check examples/plugins/hello-js
